words.def: a long (usually round) rod of wood or metal or plastic
words.zh: n. （南、北）極( pole的名詞複數 ); 地極; 柱; 截然相反的兩極之一

words.def: a long (usually round) rod of wood or metal or plastic
words.zh: n. 波蘭人, 極點, 磁極, 電極, 杆, 竿, 相反的極端

words.def: the underside of footwear or a golf club
words.zh: n. 腳掌, 鞋底, 底部

words.def: fail to keep or to maintain; cease to have, either physically or in an abstract sense
words.zh: vt. 遺失, 損失, 丟失, 使失去, 錯過, 浪費, 迷失, 使迷路, 輸去, 使沉溺於
